name: Spellcasting (Artificer)
scalingSummary: Half caster (rounds UP — slots start at L1); Intelligence; prepared; tools as spellcasting focus
mechanicalSummary: Prepare artificer spells using Intelligence. Must use tools or infused item as focus. Half-caster slot progression but rounds up (slots start at L1 unlike Paladin/Ranger). 2 cantrips at L1.

evidence.pointer: Artificer casterType=half with halfCasterFloor=1; tool-based spellcasting

notes: Unique half-caster that rounds up for slot calculation.

name: Magical Tinkering
scalingSummary: Max items = Int modifier (min 1); touch to end effect
mechanicalSummary: As an action, imbue a Tiny nonmagical object you touch with a minor magical property (light, recorded message, odor, visual effect, etc.). Max Int mod items active at once.

name: Infuse Item
resourceCostSummary: 1 infusion known per item; end of long rest to maintain
rechargeSummary: At end of each long rest, infused items remain infused; can swap which are active
scalingSummary: 2 infused items at L2, 3 at L6, 4 at L10, 5 at L14, 6 at L18; 4 known infusions at L2
mechanicalSummary: At end of a long rest, touch nonmagical items to infuse them with magic from known infusion list. Max number of infused items scales with level. Infusions last until you die or replace them.

evidence.pointer: Artificer L2: Infuse Item; L6/L10/L14/L18: Infuse Item improvement; featureDescriptions

notes: BUG-11: Missing L6 Infuse Item improvement in ruleset.ts. Corrected in current data.

name: The Right Tool for the Job
mechanicalSummary: With 1 hour of work and thieves' tools or artisan's tools in hand, create any set of artisan's tools. Tools vanish when you create another set.

evidence.pointer: Artificer L3: The Right Tool for the Job; featureDescriptions

name: Tool Expertise
mechanicalSummary: Double your proficiency bonus for any ability check that uses a tool you're proficient with.

name: Flash of Genius
trigger: When you or a creature within 30 ft makes an ability check or saving throw
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to add your Intelligence modifier to the check or save. Can use after seeing the d20 but before the DM declares result.

evidence.pointer: Artificer L7: Flash of Genius; featureDescriptions

name: Spell-Storing Item
rechargeSummary: Long rest (or until all charges used)
scalingSummary: 1st- or 2nd-level spell with casting time of 1 action; Int × 2 charges
mechanicalSummary: At end of a long rest, touch a simple or martial weapon or spellcasting focus to store one 1st- or 2nd-level artificer spell in it. Spell uses your spellcasting ability. Item holds Int × 2 charges. Any creature holding it can use an action to cast the spell using 1 charge.
notes: Lets non-casters use the item to cast the stored spell.

name: Magic Item Adept
mechanicalSummary: Attune to 4 magic items at once. Craft common or uncommon items in quarter time and half cost.

evidence.pointer: Artificer L10: Magic Item Adept; featureDescriptions

name: Soul of Artifice
scalingSummary: +1 to all saves per attuned item
mechanicalSummary: Gain +1 to all saving throws per attuned item (max +6). If reduced to 0 HP, can use reaction to end an infusion and drop to 1 HP instead, once per long rest.

evidence.pointer: Artificer L20: Soul of Artifice; featureDescriptions

name: Arcane Armor (Armorer)
mechanicalSummary: As an action, turn worn armor into Arcane Armor: no Str requirement, spellcasting focus, covers body, replaces missing limbs, can't be removed against will. Armor counts as separate items (chest, boots, helmet, weapon) for infusions.

name: Defensive Field (Armorer)
scalingSummary: Uses = PB; temp HP = artificer level
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, gain temp HP equal to artificer level (replacing existing temp HP). Lost if you doff armor.

name: Guardian (Armorer L15)
trigger: When a Huge or smaller creature ends its turn within 30 ft
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to pull a creature up to 25 ft. If pulled within 5 ft, make a melee weapon attack as part of the reaction.

name: Experimental Elixir (Alchemist)
resourceCostSummary: 1 free elixir per long rest; additional cost 1st+ spell slots
rechargeSummary: 1 free per long rest; expend spell slots for more
mechanicalSummary: At end of long rest, create 1 random experimental elixir. Roll on table for effect: Healing (2d4+Int HP), Swiftness (+10 speed 1 hr), Resilience (+1 AC 10 min), Boldness (bless-like 1 min), Flight (fly 10 ft 10 min), Transformation (alter self 10 min). As an action, a creature can drink or administer it.
notes: Random table but can also choose by expending a spell slot and choosing the effect.

name: Alchemical Savant (Alchemist)
mechanicalSummary: When casting a spell using alchemist's supplies as focus, add Intelligence modifier (min +1) to one healing roll or one acid/fire/necrotic/poison damage roll.

name: Eldritch Cannon (Artillerist)
resourceCostSummary: 1 free cannon per long rest; additional cost a spell slot of 1st+
scalingSummary: Damage: 2d8 at L3, 3d8 at L9; Flamethrower (15-ft cone, Dex save half), Force Ballista (120 ft spell attack + push 5 ft), Protector (THP to allies within 10 ft)
mechanicalSummary: As an action, summon a Small or Tiny eldritch cannon (Flamethrower, Force Ballista, or Protector) within 5 ft for 1 hour. As a bonus action, activate it. At L15 create two at once.

evidence.pointer: artillerist L3: Eldritch Cannon; L9: Explosive Cannon; L15: Fortified Position

notes: Bonus action to activate on subsequent turns.
At L9 can detonate as an action for AoE damage.

name: Steel Defender (Battle Smith)
scalingSummary: Stats scale with PB; HP = 2 + Int + 5×artificer level
mechanicalSummary: Gain a steel defender construct companion. In combat, it shares your initiative and auto-dodges. As a bonus action, command it to take another action (Attack, Dash, Disengage, Help, Hide, Search). Can use reaction to impose disadvantage on attacks against nearby allies (Deflect Attack).

name: Arcane Jolt (Battle Smith)
trigger: When you hit with a magic weapon attack or your steel defender hits
scalingSummary: Uses = Intelligence modifier (min 1); 2d6 force at L9, 4d6 at L15 (or heal ally for same amount)
mechanicalSummary: Deal extra 2d6 force damage or heal a creature/object within 30 ft for the same amount. Scales to 4d6 at L15.

evidence.pointer: battle-smith L9: Arcane Jolt; L15: Improved Defender
